content_body: We came to the cabin from East Central Florida for a change of scenery. We enjoyed all the beautiful mountains and trees. The cabin was very cozy and comfortable with a very nice view of the lake. The highlight of our trip was Brasstown Bald, the highest point, a must see! The trip by car was breathtaking and once we made it to the top by car you could hike it to the top or take a shuttle van. We also enjoyed the old shops in downtown Blue Ridge by the train station. We plan to check out Joe's BBQ tomorrow for my 56th birthday.
title: A Day Trip to Brasstown Bald from Majestic Lake Cabin
